calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Fred Keeperman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Challenge Dairy Products, Inc.
Ray Gutierez, Credit Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Jerry's Famous Deli, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on February 19, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 15, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Challenge Dairy Products, Inc. and against Defaulted Defendant Jerry's Famous Deli, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,907.35.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,930.84.
Costs - $425.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $4,263.19.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Continued To Jun-01-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-19-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Off Calendar
